---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Fabio I. Martinenghi"
toc: false
---

## Course materials

**Applied Econometrics Reading Group Notes** — *Notes on Mostly Harmless Econometrics and Beyond.* Developed with Fangzhou Yu and Yangqi Zhang for the Oz Metrics Reading Group at UNSW (2022–23, ongoing).

Topics covered: experimental ideal, sampling design, DAGs, sensitivity analysis, instrumental variables, synthetic control, regression discontinuity, difference-in-differences and event studies, and double machine learning (theory and applied).

[[Read the notes →](notes/index.html)]{.paper-links}

## University teaching

### UNSW School of Economics

**2021**

- *Environmental Economics* — Lecturer-in-Charge
- *Evidence-Based Problem Solving* (Business Statistics) — Teaching Assistant

**2020**

- *Business and Government* (Public Economics) — Lecturer-in-Charge
- *Economics Perspectives* (Philosophy of Economics) — Lecturer
- *Business Decision Making* (Microeconomics) — Teaching Assistant
- *Game Theory & Business Strategy* — Teaching Assistant
